svg.title: V2X vehicle station with cores in a row, modem above, sensor and dedicated GPS receiver below feeding the Cortex-M
svg.desc: Cortex-A MPU and Cortex-M MCU sit side by side. Quectel modem is above the Cortex-A over USB3/PCIe with QMI. A sensor and a dedicated GPS receiver are below the Cortex-M; the sensor link is CAN-FD/SPI bidirectional and the GPS feed is one-way GNSS PVT plus 1PPS into the Cortex-M. A note states the Cortex-A configures the modem and GNSS data flows one-way to the Cortex-M.
